'''鈭歾h-y-y-ng''' ('''kazhayengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:antiport|antiport]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-y-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:antiport|antiport]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-y-y-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kazhayengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
